skins.name: Forecast Janna
skins.description: Janna has survived the market downswing in televised news for at least the last decade, but even in her relatively cushy position, the viewers are getting older and the weather is getting freakier. Might be time to put her meteorology degree to good use, and… fight the sky!

skins.name: Sacred Sword Janna
skins.description: Janna is the guardian of an ancient sword made of the purest jade, hidden at the bottom of a silent lake. Those who wield this weapon are granted immortality, and so she must remain steadfast in order to protect it.

skins.name: Crystal Rose Janna

chromas.name: Crystal Rose Janna (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

skins.description: The desire for peace brought about more than just a yearly festival. Born from this universal wish was Janna, a spirit whose magic hangs like a wreath over the night. Though she's regarded by most as a legend, guests sometimes say they see a beautiful woman float by. Maybe it's a trick of the crystal rose's light...

skins.name: Cyber Halo Janna

chromas.name: Cyber Halo Janna (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

chromas.name: Cyber Halo Janna (Ace)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2022 Steel Valkyrie event.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2022 Steel Valkyrie event.

skins.description: An experiment from RSM's R&D division, Janna is the only successful use of an android to pilot an exosuit in history. Perhaps it's because she looks so human that most forget the gusts of “wind“ she commands are actually a fleet of nanobots connected directly to both the X09-Zephyr as well as her central processing core.

skins.name: Prestige Cyber Halo Janna
skins.description: Always a breath of fresh air in the fashion world, Janna took a risk working with a new designer for her high-tech red carpet look. That risk was well worth it: the future of fashion is here, and it's looking bright.

passive.name: Tailwind
passive.description: Janna and her allied champions gain 3% increased Movement Speed.

spells.name: Howling Gale
spells.description: By creating a localized change in pressure and temperature, Janna is able to create a small storm that grows in size with time. She can active the spell again to release the storm. On release this storm will fly towards the direction it was cast in, dealing damage and knocking away any enemies in its path.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Summons a whirlwind, which deals @MinimumDamage@ magic damage to all enemies in its path and Knocks them into the air. The whirlwind travels further, deals @ChargeDamage@ bonus damage, and Knocks enemies higher, for each second it charges (up to a maximum of 3 seconds).

Recast to release the whirlwind early.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Zephyr
spells.description: Janna summons an air elemental that passively increases her Movement Speed and enables her to pass through units. She may also activate this ability to deal damage and slow an enemy's Movement Speed. The passive is lost while this ability is on cooldown.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Passive: Increases Movement Speed by @MSPercent*100@% and allows movement through units.

Active: Deals @TotalDamage@ magic damage to an enemy and Slows by @MovementSpeedForTooltip@% for @SlowDuration@ seconds. Passive benefit is lost while Zephyr is on cooldown.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Eye Of The Storm
spells.description: Janna conjures a defensive gale that shields an ally champion or turret from incoming damage and increases their Attack Damage.
spells.dynamicDescription: Shields an allied Champion or turret for @ShieldDuration@ seconds. The shield absorbs up to <shield>@TotalShield@ damage</shield> and grants <physicalDamage>@BonusAD@ Attack Damage</physicalDamage> until it breaks.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Monsoon
spells.description: Janna surrounds herself in a magical storm, throwing enemies back. After the storm has settled, soothing winds heal nearby allies while the ability is active.
spells.dynamicDescription: Summons forth the might of the wind to <recast>Knockback</recast> surrounding enemies and restores <healing>@TotalHeal@ Health</healing> to nearby allies over 4 seconds.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@
